arts.sum: Anderlecht return to Lotto Park with a three-goal deficit to try and overturn following last week's defeat to Fenerbahce in Istanbul. David Hubert's side bounced back from that first-leg loss with a ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Anderlecht vs. Fenerbahce - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Anderlecht and Fenerbahce, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
